name: Simple Summer Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup string beans or peas, fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut the fresh spinach into strips.
2. Melt the butter in a soup pot over medium heat.
3. Add the onion, carrots, and celery to the pot. Cook, stirring often, for 5 minutes.
4. Add the broth and tomatoes. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the zucchini and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Add the spinach and cook until just wilted, about 1 minute.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
